name: @stashflow/document-parser
description: Cost-optimized document parsing pipeline — Deno-compatible, no Supabase dependency

scripts.gen:schemas: json2ts -i schemas/loan_schema.json -o src/generated_loan_schema.ts && json2ts -i schemas/transaction_schema.json -o src/generated_transaction_schema.ts && json2ts -i schemas/anomaly_schema.json -o src/generated_anomaly_schema.ts && json2ts -i schemas/unified_document_schema.json -o src/generated_unified_schema.ts
